data.name: RH3001MessageFormat
data.value: The logical operator ! should not be used for clarity.

data.name: RH3001Title
data.value: The logical operator ! should not be used for clarity.

data.name: RH3101MessageFormat
data.value: Do not prefix calls with base. Unless a local implementation exists.

data.name: RH3101Title
data.value: Do not prefix calls with base. Unless a local implementation exists.

data.name: RH3102MessageFormat
data.value: Code must not contain empty statements.

data.name: RH3102Title
data.value: Code must not contain empty statements.

data.name: RH3002MessageFormat
data.value: Statements must not use unnecessary parentheses.

data.name: RH3002Title
data.value: Statements must not use unnecessary parentheses.

data.name: RH3201MessageFormat
data.value: Comments must contain text.

data.name: RH3201Title
data.value: Comments must contain text.

data.name: RH3003MessageFormat
data.value: Use string.Empty for empty strings.

data.name: RH3003Title
data.value: Use string.Empty for empty strings.

data.name: RH3103MessageFormat
data.value: Use shorthand for nullable types.

data.name: RH3103Title
data.value: Use shorthand for nullable types.

data.name: RH3104MessageFormat
data.value: Do not use default value type constructor.

data.name: RH3104Title
data.value: Do not use default value type constructor.

data.name: RH3004MessageFormat
data.value: Use lambda syntax.

data.name: RH3004Title
data.value: Use lambda syntax.

data.name: RH3005MessageFormat
data.value: Use readable conditions.

data.name: RH3005Title
data.value: Use readable conditions.

data.name: RH3006MessageFormat
data.value: Conditional expressions must declare precedence.

data.name: RH3006Title
data.value: Conditional expressions must declare precedence.

data.name: RH3105MessageFormat
data.value: Do not prefix local members with this.

data.name: RH3105Title
data.value: Do not prefix local members with this.

data.name: RH3007MessageFormat
data.value: Do not use query syntax.

data.name: RH3007Title
data.value: Do not use query syntax.

data.name: RH2001MessageFormat
data.value: Private auto-implemented properties should not be used.

data.name: RH2001Title
data.value: Private auto-implemented properties should not be used.

data.name: RH2002MessageFormat
data.value: Async void methods should not be used.

data.name: RH2002Title
data.value: Async void methods should not be used.

data.name: RH2003MessageFormat
data.value: NotImplementedException should not be used.

data.name: RH2003Title
data.value: NotImplementedException should not be used.

data.name: RH2004MessageFormat
data.value: Access modifier must be declared.

data.name: RH2004Title
data.value: Access modifier must be declared.

data.name: RH2005MessageFormat
data.value: Fields must be private.

data.name: RH2005Title
data.value: Fields must be private.

data.name: RH7001MessageFormat
data.value: File may only contain a single namespace.

data.name: RH7001Title
data.value: File may only contain a single namespace.

data.name: RH8501MessageFormat
data.value: Code analysis suppressions must have a justification.

data.name: RH8501Title
data.value: Code analysis suppressions must have a justification.

data.name: RH2006MessageFormat
data.value: Debug.Assert must provide message text.

data.name: RH2006Title
data.value: Debug.Assert must provide message text.

data.name: RH2007MessageFormat
data.value: Debug.Fail must provide message text.

data.name: RH2007Title
data.value: Debug.Fail must provide message text.

data.name: RH3106MessageFormat
data.value: Unnecessary delegate parentheses should be removed.

data.name: RH3106Title
data.value: Unnecessary delegate parentheses should be removed.

data.name: RH3107MessageFormat
data.value: Unnecessary attribute constructor parentheses should be removed.

data.name: RH3107Title
data.value: Unnecessary attribute constructor parentheses should be removed.

data.name: RH7002MessageFormat
data.value: File may only contain a single top-level type.

data.name: RH7002Title
data.value: File may only contain a single top-level type.

data.name: RH2101MessageFormat
data.value: Nested classes should not be used.

data.name: RH2101Title
data.value: Nested classes should not be used.

data.name: RH2102MessageFormat
data.value: Classes should not use parameterized primary constructors.

data.name: RH2102Title
data.value: Classes should not use parameterized primary constructors.

data.name: RH2103MessageFormat
data.value: Structs should not use parameterized primary constructors.

data.name: RH2103Title
data.value: Structs should not use parameterized primary constructors.

data.name: RH2104MessageFormat
data.value: Nested structs should not be used.

data.name: RH2104Title
data.value: Nested structs should not be used.

data.name: RH2105MessageFormat
data.value: Nested interfaces should not be used.

data.name: RH2105Title
data.value: Nested interfaces should not be used.

data.name: RH2106MessageFormat
data.value: Nested records should not be used.

data.name: RH2106Title
data.value: Nested records should not be used.

data.name: RH2107MessageFormat
data.value: Nested enums should not be used.

data.name: RH2107Title
data.value: Nested enums should not be used.

data.name: RH2108MessageFormat
data.value: Nested delegates should not be used.

data.name: RH2108Title
data.value: Nested delegates should not be used.

data.name: RH2109MessageFormat
data.value: Razor @code blocks should not be used. Move component logic to a partial class in a matching .razor.cs file.

data.name: RH2109Title
data.value: Razor @code blocks should not be used.

data.name: RH4001MessageFormat
data.value: The name of the class/struct/enum should match the filename.

data.name: RH4001Title
data.value: The name of the class/struct/enum should match the filename.

data.name: RH4002MessageFormat
data.value: Class names should be in PascalCase

data.name: RH4002Title
data.value: Class names should be in PascalCase

data.name: RH4003MessageFormat
data.value: Struct names should be in PascalCase

data.name: RH4003Title
data.value: Struct names should be in PascalCase

data.name: RH4004Title
data.value: Enumeration names should be in PascalCase

data.name: RH4004MessageFormat
data.value: Enumeration names should be in PascalCase

data.name: RH4101Title
data.value: Enumeration members names should be in PascalCase

data.name: RH4101MessageFormat
data.value: Enumeration members names should be in PascalCase

data.name: RH4005Title
data.value: Interface names should use the I prefix and PascalCase

data.name: RH4005MessageFormat
data.value: Interface names should use the I prefix and PascalCase

data.name: RH4102Title
data.value: Event names should be in PascalCase

data.name: RH4102MessageFormat
data.value: Event names should be in PascalCase

data.name: RH4006Title
data.value: Delegate names should be in PascalCase

data.name: RH4006MessageFormat
data.value: Delegate names should be in PascalCase

data.name: RH4103Title
data.value: Method members names should be in PascalCase

data.name: RH4103MessageFormat
data.value: Method members names should be in PascalCase

data.name: RH4104Title
data.value: Local function names should be in PascalCase

data.name: RH4104MessageFormat
data.value: Local function names should be in PascalCase

data.name: RH4105Title
data.value: Method parameter names should be in camelCase

data.name: RH4105MessageFormat
data.value: Method parameter names should be in camelCase

data.name: RH4106Title
data.value: Private field names should be in _camelCase

data.name: RH4106MessageFormat
data.value: Private field names should be in _camelCase

data.name: RH4107Title
data.value: Protected field names should be in _camelCase

data.name: RH4107MessageFormat
data.value: Protected field names should be in _camelCase

data.name: RH4108Title
data.value: Internal field names should be in PascalCase

data.name: RH4108MessageFormat
data.value: Internal field names should be in PascalCase

data.name: RH4109Title
data.value: Public field names should be in PascalCase

data.name: RH4109MessageFormat
data.value: Public field names should be in PascalCase

data.name: RH4110Title
data.value: Const field names should be in PascalCase

data.name: RH4110MessageFormat
data.value: Const field names should be in PascalCase

data.name: RH4111Title
data.value: Private property names should be in PascalCase

data.name: RH4111MessageFormat
data.value: Private property names should be in PascalCase

data.name: RH4112Title
data.value: Protected property names should be in PascalCase

data.name: RH4112MessageFormat
data.value: Protected property names should be in PascalCase

data.name: RH4113Title
data.value: Internal property names should be in PascalCase

data.name: RH4113MessageFormat
data.value: Internal property names should be in PascalCase

data.name: RH4114Title
data.value: Public property names should be in PascalCase

data.name: RH4114MessageFormat
data.value: Public property names should be in PascalCase

data.name: RH4115Title
data.value: Local variable names should be in camelCase

data.name: RH4115MessageFormat
data.value: Local variables should be in camelCase

data.name: RH4116Title
data.value: Named tuple elements should be in PascalCase

data.name: RH4116MessageFormat
data.value: Named tuple elements should be in PascalCase

data.name: RH4117Title
data.value: Deconstruction variable names should be in camelCase

data.name: RH4117MessageFormat
data.value: Variables in deconstruction should be in camelCase

data.name: RH4118Title
data.value: Named tuple argument names should be in PascalCase

data.name: RH4118MessageFormat
data.value: Named tuple argument names should be in PascalCase

data.name: RH4007Title
data.value: Namespaces should be in PascalCase

data.name: RH4007MessageFormat
data.value: Namespaces should be in PascalCase

data.name: RH4008Title
data.value: Namespaces should be in PascalCase

data.name: RH4008MessageFormat
data.value: Namespaces should be in PascalCase

data.name: RH4009Title
data.value: The given namespace is not allowed (see reihitsu.json)

data.name: RH4009MessageFormat
data.value: The given namespace is not allowed (see reihitsu.json)

data.name: RH4119Title
data.value: Single-letter identifiers should not be used

data.name: RH4119MessageFormat
data.value: Single-letter identifiers should not be used

data.name: RH4010Title
data.value: Record names should be in PascalCase

data.name: RH4010MessageFormat
data.value: Record names should be in PascalCase

data.name: RH4011Title
data.value: Record struct names should be in PascalCase

data.name: RH4011MessageFormat
data.value: Record struct names should be in PascalCase

data.name: RH4120Title
data.value: Record primary constructor parameter names should be in PascalCase

data.name: RH4120MessageFormat
data.value: Record primary constructor parameter names should be in PascalCase

data.name: RH7301MessageFormat
data.value: The description of the #region and #endregion should match.

data.name: RH7301Title
data.value: The description of the #region and #endregion should match.

data.name: RH5301MessageFormat
data.value: The object initializer should be formatted correctly.

data.name: RH5301Title
data.value: The object initializer should be formatted correctly.

data.name: RH5001MessageFormat
data.value: The try-Statement should be preceded by a blank line.

data.name: RH5001Title
data.value: The try-Statement should be preceded by a blank line.

data.name: RH5002MessageFormat
data.value: The if-Statement should be preceded by a blank line.

data.name: RH5002Title
data.value: The if-Statement should be preceded by a blank line.

data.name: RH5003MessageFormat
data.value: The while-Statement should be preceded by a blank line.

data.name: RH5003Title
data.value: The while-Statement should be preceded by a blank line.

data.name: RH5004MessageFormat
data.value: The do-Statement should be preceded by a blank line.

data.name: RH5004Title
data.value: The do-Statement should be preceded by a blank line.

data.name: RH5005MessageFormat
data.value: The using-Statement should be preceded by a blank line.

data.name: RH5005Title
data.value: The using-Statement should be preceded by a blank line.

data.name: RH5006MessageFormat
data.value: The foreach-Statement should be preceded by a blank line.

data.name: RH5006Title
data.value: The foreach-Statement should be preceded by a blank line.

data.name: RH5007MessageFormat
data.value: The for-Statement should be preceded by a blank line.

data.name: RH5007Title
data.value: The for-Statement should be preceded by a blank line.

data.name: RH5008MessageFormat
data.value: The return-Statement should be preceded by a blank line.

data.name: RH5008Title
data.value: The return-Statement should be preceded by a blank line.

data.name: RH5009MessageFormat
data.value: The goto-Statement should be preceded by a blank line.

data.name: RH5009Title
data.value: The goto-Statement should be preceded by a blank line.

data.name: RH5010MessageFormat
data.value: The break-Statement should be preceded by a blank line.

data.name: RH5010Title
data.value: The break-Statement should be preceded by a blank line.

data.name: RH5011MessageFormat
data.value: The break-Statement should be followed by a blank line.

data.name: RH5011Title
data.value: The break-Statement should be followed by a blank line.

data.name: RH5012MessageFormat
data.value: The continue-Statement should be preceded by a blank line.

data.name: RH5012Title
data.value: The continue-Statement should be preceded by a blank line.

data.name: RH5013MessageFormat
data.value: The throw-Statement should be preceded by a blank line.

data.name: RH5013Title
data.value: The throw-Statement should be preceded by a blank line.

data.name: RH5014MessageFormat
data.value: The switch-Statement should be preceded by a blank line.

data.name: RH5014Title
data.value: The switch-Statement should be preceded by a blank line.

data.name: RH5015MessageFormat
data.value: The checked-Statement should be preceded by a blank line.

data.name: RH5015Title
data.value: The checked-Statement should be preceded by a blank line.

data.name: RH5016MessageFormat
data.value: The unchecked-Statement should be preceded by a blank line.

data.name: RH5016Title
data.value: The unchecked-Statement should be preceded by a blank line.

data.name: RH5017MessageFormat
data.value: The fixed-Statement should be preceded by a blank line.

data.name: RH5017Title
data.value: The fixed-Statement should be preceded by a blank line.

data.name: RH5018MessageFormat
data.value: The lock-Statement should be preceded by a blank line.

data.name: RH5018Title
data.value: The lock-Statement should be preceded by a blank line.

data.name: RH5019MessageFormat
data.value: The yield-Statement should be preceded by a blank line.

data.name: RH5019Title
data.value: The yield-Statement should be preceded by a blank line.

data.name: RH5020MessageFormat
data.value: Single-line comments should be preceded by a blank line.

data.name: RH5020Title
data.value: Single-line comments should be preceded by a blank line.

data.name: RH5021MessageFormat
data.value: Local declarations should be followed by a blank line.

data.name: RH5021Title
data.value: Local declarations should be followed by a blank line.

data.name: RH5201MessageFormat
data.value: Method chains should be aligned.

data.name: RH5201Title
data.value: Method chains should be aligned.

data.name: RH5112MessageFormat
data.value: Wrapped fluent calls should keep the first call on the original line.

data.name: RH5112Title
data.value: Wrapped fluent calls should keep the first call on the original line.

data.name: RH5303MessageFormat
data.value: The collection initializer should be formatted correctly.

data.name: RH5303Title
data.value: The collection initializer should be formatted correctly.

data.name: RH5206MessageFormat
data.value: Switch expression braces should be anchored.

data.name: RH5206Title
data.value: Switch expression braces should be anchored.

data.name: RH7401MessageFormat
data.value: Override methods should be placed in a top-level region named '{0}'.

data.name: RH7401Title
data.value: Override methods should be grouped by base type regions.

data.name: RH7402MessageFormat
data.value: Override properties should be placed in a top-level region named '{0}'.

data.name: RH7402Title
data.value: Override properties should be grouped by base type regions.

data.name: RH7403MessageFormat
data.value: Override events should be placed in a top-level region named '{0}'.

data.name: RH7403Title
data.value: Override events should be grouped by base type regions.

data.name: RH7404MessageFormat
data.value: Override indexers should be placed in a top-level region named '{0}'.

data.name: RH7404Title
data.value: Override indexers should be grouped by base type regions.

data.name: RH7405MessageFormat
data.value: Non-override methods should not be placed in the top-level override region named '{0}'.

data.name: RH7405Title
data.value: Non-override methods should not be placed in override regions.

data.name: RH7406MessageFormat
data.value: Non-override properties should not be placed in the top-level override region named '{0}'.

data.name: RH7406Title
data.value: Non-override properties should not be placed in override regions.

data.name: RH7407MessageFormat
data.value: Non-override events should not be placed in the top-level override region named '{0}'.

data.name: RH7407Title
data.value: Non-override events should not be placed in override regions.

data.name: RH7408MessageFormat
data.value: Non-override indexers should not be placed in the top-level override region named '{0}'.

data.name: RH7408Title
data.value: Non-override indexers should not be placed in override regions.

data.name: RH5408MessageFormat
data.value: Simple auto-properties should be single lined.

data.name: RH5408Title
data.value: Simple auto-properties should be single lined.

data.name: RH7003MessageFormat
data.value: File-scoped namespaces should be used.

data.name: RH7003Title
data.value: File-scoped namespaces should be used.

data.name: RH5409MessageFormat
data.value: Final enum members must not have trailing commas.

data.name: RH5409Title
data.value: Final enum members must not have trailing commas.

data.name: RH5410MessageFormat
data.value: Final array initializer items must not have trailing commas.

data.name: RH5410Title
data.value: Final array initializer items must not have trailing commas.

data.name: RH5411MessageFormat
data.value: Final collection initializer items must not have trailing commas.

data.name: RH5411Title
data.value: Final collection initializer items must not have trailing commas.

data.name: RH5412MessageFormat
data.value: Empty classes should use semicolon declarations.

data.name: RH5412Title
data.value: Empty classes should use semicolon declarations.

data.name: RH5413MessageFormat
data.value: Empty structs should use semicolon declarations.

data.name: RH5413Title
data.value: Empty structs should use semicolon declarations.

data.name: RH5414MessageFormat
data.value: Empty interfaces should use semicolon declarations.

data.name: RH5414Title
data.value: Empty interfaces should use semicolon declarations.

data.name: RH5415MessageFormat
data.value: Empty records should use semicolon declarations.

data.name: RH5415Title
data.value: Empty records should use semicolon declarations.

data.name: RH5416MessageFormat
data.value: Empty record structs should use semicolon declarations.

data.name: RH5416Title
data.value: Empty record structs should use semicolon declarations.

data.name: RH3204MessageFormat
data.value: Interpolated strings without interpolation should not use the dollar marker.

data.name: RH3204Title
data.value: Interpolated strings without interpolation should not use the dollar marker.

data.name: RH5304MessageFormat
data.value: Nested collection initializer assignments should be formatted correctly.

data.name: RH5304Title
data.value: Nested collection initializer assignments should be formatted correctly.

data.name: RH5305MessageFormat
data.value: Collection expressions should be formatted correctly.

data.name: RH5305Title
data.value: Collection expressions should be formatted correctly.

data.name: RH5306MessageFormat
data.value: List patterns should be formatted correctly.

data.name: RH5306Title
data.value: List patterns should be formatted correctly.

data.name: RH5307MessageFormat
data.value: Indexer bracketed arguments should be single lined.

data.name: RH5307Title
data.value: Indexer bracketed arguments should be single lined.

data.name: RH3202MessageFormat
data.value: Expression style methods should not be used.

data.name: RH3202Title
data.value: Expression style methods should not be used.

data.name: RH3203MessageFormat
data.value: Expression style constructors should not be used.

data.name: RH3203Title
data.value: Expression style constructors should not be used.

data.name: RH5401MessageFormat
data.value: Expression style get-only properties should be single lined.

data.name: RH5401Title
data.value: Expression style get-only properties should be single lined.

data.name: RH7302MessageFormat
data.value: The description of the #region should start with an uppercase letter.

data.name: RH7302Title
data.value: The description of the #region should start with an uppercase letter.

data.name: RH5302MessageFormat
data.value: Logical expressions should be formatted correctly.

data.name: RH5302Title
data.value: Logical expressions should be formatted correctly.

data.name: RH5202MessageFormat
data.value: Raw string literals should be formatted correctly.

data.name: RH5202Title
data.value: Raw string literals should be formatted correctly.

data.name: RH5101MessageFormat
data.value: The first argument should be on the same line as the opening parenthesis.

data.name: RH5101Title
data.value: The first argument should be on the same line as the opening parenthesis.

data.name: RH5102MessageFormat
data.value: Arguments should either all be on one line or each on its own line.

data.name: RH5102Title
data.value: Arguments should either all be on one line or each on its own line.

data.name: RH5203MessageFormat
data.value: Multi-line arguments should be aligned.

data.name: RH5203Title
data.value: Multi-line arguments should be aligned.

data.name: RH5602MessageFormat
data.value: Code must not contain trailing whitespace.

data.name: RH5602Title
data.value: Code must not contain trailing whitespace.

data.name: RH5028MessageFormat
data.value: Code must not contain blank lines at the start of the file.

data.name: RH5028Title
data.value: Code must not contain blank lines at the start of the file.

data.name: RH5603MessageFormat
data.value: File must not end with a newline.

data.name: RH5603Title
data.value: File must not end with a newline.

data.name: RH5103MessageFormat
data.value: Code must not contain multiple statements on one line.

data.name: RH5103Title
data.value: Code must not contain multiple statements on one line.

data.name: RH7101MessageFormat
data.value: Field declarations must not combine multiple variables.

data.name: RH7101Title
data.value: Field declarations must not combine multiple variables.

data.name: RH7303MessageFormat
data.value: Regions must not be placed within elements.

data.name: RH7303Title
data.value: Regions must not be placed within elements.

data.name: RH8304MessageFormat
data.value: XML documentation elements must be on separate lines.

data.name: RH8304Title
data.value: XML documentation elements must be on separate lines

data.name: RH8305MessageFormat
data.value: Summary element must span at least three lines.

data.name: RH8305Title
data.value: Summary element must span at least three lines

data.name: RH8306MessageFormat
data.value: XML documentation element text must not end with a period.

data.name: RH8306Title
data.value: XML documentation element text must not end with a period

data.name: RH8307MessageFormat
data.value: Content after opening XML tag must be on same line as closing tag.

data.name: RH8307Title
data.value: Content after opening XML tag must be on same line as closing tag

data.name: RH8308MessageFormat
data.value: No content should appear after closing XML tags.

data.name: RH8308Title
data.value: No content should appear after closing XML tags

data.name: RH8309MessageFormat
data.value: XML documentation elements must follow the prescribed order.

data.name: RH8309Title
data.value: XML documentation elements must follow a prescribed order

data.name: RH6001MessageFormat
data.value: Keywords must be spaced correctly.

data.name: RH6001Title
data.value: Keywords must be spaced correctly

data.name: RH6002MessageFormat
data.value: Commas must be spaced correctly.

data.name: RH6002Title
data.value: Commas must be spaced correctly

data.name: RH6003MessageFormat
data.value: Semicolons must be spaced correctly.

data.name: RH6003Title
data.value: Semicolons must be spaced correctly

data.name: RH8301MessageFormat
data.value: Documentation lines must begin with single space.

data.name: RH8301Title
data.value: Documentation lines must begin with single space

data.name: RH6004MessageFormat
data.value: Preprocessor keywords must not be preceded by space.

data.name: RH6004Title
data.value: Preprocessor keywords must not be preceded by space

data.name: RH6005MessageFormat
data.value: Operator keyword must be followed by space.

data.name: RH6005Title
data.value: Operator keyword must be followed by space

data.name: RH6006MessageFormat
data.value: Opening parenthesis must be spaced correctly.

data.name: RH6006Title
data.value: Opening parenthesis must be spaced correctly

data.name: RH6007MessageFormat
data.value: Opening square brackets must be spaced correctly.

data.name: RH6007Title
data.value: Opening square brackets must be spaced correctly

data.name: RH6008MessageFormat
data.value: Closing square brackets must be spaced correctly.

data.name: RH6008Title
data.value: Closing square brackets must be spaced correctly

data.name: RH6009MessageFormat
data.value: Opening braces must be spaced correctly.

data.name: RH6009Title
data.value: Opening braces must be spaced correctly

data.name: RH6010MessageFormat
data.value: Closing braces must be spaced correctly.

data.name: RH6010Title
data.value: Closing braces must be spaced correctly

data.name: RH6011MessageFormat
data.value: Opening generic brackets must be spaced correctly.

data.name: RH6011Title
data.value: Opening generic brackets must be spaced correctly

data.name: RH6012MessageFormat
data.value: Closing generic brackets must be spaced correctly.

data.name: RH6012Title
data.value: Closing generic brackets must be spaced correctly

data.name: RH6013MessageFormat
data.value: Opening attribute brackets must be spaced correctly.

data.name: RH6013Title
data.value: Opening attribute brackets must be spaced correctly

data.name: RH6014MessageFormat
data.value: Closing attribute brackets must be spaced correctly.

data.name: RH6014Title
data.value: Closing attribute brackets must be spaced correctly

data.name: RH6015MessageFormat
data.value: Nullable type symbols must not be preceded by space.

data.name: RH6015Title
data.value: Nullable type symbols must not be preceded by space

data.name: RH6016MessageFormat
data.value: Member access symbols must be spaced correctly.

data.name: RH6016Title
data.value: Member access symbols must be spaced correctly

data.name: RH6017MessageFormat
data.value: Increment/decrement symbols must be spaced correctly.

data.name: RH6017Title
data.value: Increment/decrement symbols must be spaced correctly

data.name: RH6018MessageFormat
data.value: Negative signs must be spaced correctly.

data.name: RH6018Title
data.value: Negative signs must be spaced correctly

data.name: RH6019MessageFormat
data.value: Positive signs must be spaced correctly.

data.name: RH6019Title
data.value: Positive signs must be spaced correctly

data.name: RH6020MessageFormat
data.value: Dereference and access-of symbols must be spaced correctly.

data.name: RH6020Title
data.value: Dereference and access-of symbols must be spaced correctly

data.name: RH6021MessageFormat
data.value: Colons must be spaced correctly.

data.name: RH6021Title
data.value: Colons must be spaced correctly

data.name: RH6022MessageFormat
data.value: No space after new for implicitly typed arrays.

data.name: RH6022Title
data.value: No space after new for implicitly typed arrays

data.name: RH5601MessageFormat
data.value: Use tabs correctly.

data.name: RH5601Title
data.value: Use tabs correctly

data.name: RH5402MessageFormat
data.value: Braces for multi-line statements must not share line.

data.name: RH5402Title
data.value: Braces for multi-line statements must not share line

data.name: RH5403MessageFormat
data.value: Statement must not be on a single line.

data.name: RH5403Title
data.value: Statement must not be on a single line

data.name: RH5404MessageFormat
data.value: Element must not be on a single line.

data.name: RH5404Title
data.value: Element must not be on a single line

data.name: RH5405MessageFormat
data.value: Braces must not be omitted.

data.name: RH5405Title
data.value: Braces must not be omitted

data.name: RH5022MessageFormat
data.value: Opening brace must not be followed by blank line.

data.name: RH5022Title
data.value: Opening brace must not be followed by blank line

data.name: RH8302MessageFormat
data.value: Element documentation headers must not be followed by blank line.

data.name: RH8302Title
data.value: Element documentation headers must not be followed by blank line

data.name: RH5023MessageFormat
data.value: Code must not contain multiple blank lines in a row.

data.name: RH5023Title
data.value: Code must not contain multiple blank lines in a row

data.name: RH5024MessageFormat
data.value: Closing brace must not be preceded by blank line.

data.name: RH5024Title
data.value: Closing brace must not be preceded by blank line

data.name: RH5025MessageFormat
data.value: Opening brace must not be preceded by blank line.

data.name: RH5025Title
data.value: Opening brace must not be preceded by blank line

data.name: RH5026MessageFormat
data.value: Chained statement blocks must not be preceded by blank line.

data.name: RH5026Title
data.value: Chained statement blocks must not be preceded by blank line

data.name: RH5027MessageFormat
data.value: While-do footer must not be preceded by blank line.

data.name: RH5027Title
data.value: While-do footer must not be preceded by blank line

data.name: RH8303MessageFormat
data.value: Element documentation header must be preceded by blank line.

data.name: RH8303Title
data.value: Element documentation header must be preceded by blank line

data.name: RH5406MessageFormat
data.value: Braces must not be omitted from multi-line child statements.

data.name: RH5406Title
data.value: Braces must not be omitted from multi-line child statements

data.name: RH5407MessageFormat
data.value: Use braces consistently.

data.name: RH5407Title
data.value: Use braces consistently

data.name: RH5104MessageFormat
data.value: Comments must be on their own line.

data.name: RH5104Title
data.value: Comments must be on their own line

data.name: RH5105MessageFormat
data.value: Opening parenthesis for methods and constructors must be on declaration line.

data.name: RH5105Title
data.value: Opening parenthesis for methods and constructors must be on declaration line

data.name: RH5106MessageFormat
data.value: Closing parenthesis for methods and constructors must be on line of last argument.

data.name: RH5106Title
data.value: Closing parenthesis for methods and constructors must be on line of last argument

data.name: RH5107MessageFormat
data.value: Comma must be on same line as previous parameter.

data.name: RH5107Title
data.value: Comma must be on same line as previous parameter

data.name: RH5108MessageFormat
data.value: Parameter list must follow declaration.

data.name: RH5108Title
data.value: Parameter list must follow declaration

data.name: RH5109MessageFormat
data.value: Parameters must be on same line or separate lines.

data.name: RH5109Title
data.value: Parameters must be on same line or separate lines

data.name: RH5110MessageFormat
data.value: Generic type constraints should be on their own line with proper indentation.

data.name: RH5110Title
data.value: Generic type constraints should be on their own line with proper indentation

data.name: RH5604MessageFormat
data.value: Code must not contain mixed line endings.

data.name: RH5604Title
data.value: Code must not contain mixed line endings

data.name: RH7304MessageFormat
data.value: Region directives must use consistent indentation with containing code.

data.name: RH7304Title
data.value: Region directives must use consistent indentation with containing code

data.name: RH7305AMessageFormat
data.value: Types with multiple member kinds should be organized with regions.

data.name: RH7305ATitle
data.value: Types with multiple member kinds should be organized with regions

data.name: RH7305MessageFormat
data.value: Types should be organized with regions.

data.name: RH7305Title
data.value: Types should be organized with regions

data.name: RH7306MessageFormat
data.value: Region descriptions should not end with implementation.

data.name: RH7306Title
data.value: Region descriptions should not end with implementation

data.name: RH5204MessageFormat
data.value: Indentation must use 4 spaces per scope level.

data.name: RH5204Title
data.value: Indentation must use 4 spaces per scope level

data.name: RH7102Title
data.value: Constants must appear before fields

data.name: RH7102MessageFormat
data.value: Constants must appear before fields.

data.name: RH7103Title
data.value: Static elements must appear before instance elements

data.name: RH7103MessageFormat
data.value: Static elements must appear before instance elements.

data.name: RH7104Title
data.value: Partial elements must declare access modifier

data.name: RH7104MessageFormat
data.value: Partial elements must declare an access modifier.

data.name: RH7105Title
data.value: Declaration keywords must follow order

data.name: RH7105MessageFormat
data.value: Declaration keywords must follow the required order.

data.name: RH7106Title
data.value: Protected must come before internal

data.name: RH7106MessageFormat
data.value: Compound access modifiers must use the correct keyword order.

data.name: RH7201Title
data.value: System using directives must be placed before other using directives

data.name: RH7201MessageFormat
data.value: System using directives must be placed before other using directives.

data.name: RH7202Title
data.value: Using alias directives must be placed after other using directives

data.name: RH7202MessageFormat
data.value: Using alias directives must be placed after other using directives.

data.name: RH7203Title
data.value: Using directives must be ordered alphabetically by namespace

data.name: RH7203MessageFormat
data.value: Using directives must be ordered alphabetically by namespace.

data.name: RH7204Title
data.value: Using alias directives must be ordered alphabetically by alias name

data.name: RH7204MessageFormat
data.value: Using alias directives must be ordered alphabetically by alias name.

data.name: RH7107Title
data.value: Property accessors must follow order

data.name: RH7107MessageFormat
data.value: Property accessors must appear in the correct order.

data.name: RH7108Title
data.value: Event accessors must follow order

data.name: RH7108MessageFormat
data.value: Event accessors must appear in the correct order.

data.name: RH7109Title
data.value: Readonly elements must appear before non-readonly elements

data.name: RH7109MessageFormat
data.value: Readonly fields must appear before non-readonly fields.

data.name: RH7205Title
data.value: Using static directives must be placed at correct position

data.name: RH7205MessageFormat
data.value: Using static directives must appear after regular usings and before aliases.

data.name: RH7206Title
data.value: Using static directives must be ordered alphabetically

data.name: RH7206MessageFormat
data.value: Using static directives must be ordered alphabetically.

data.name: RH0001Title
data.value: reihitsu.json configuration must be valid

data.name: RH0001MessageFormat
data.value: The reihitsu.json configuration is invalid: {0}

data.name: RH0002Title
data.value: Documentation rules are not active for this project

data.name: RH0002MessageFormat
data.value: Documentation-category rules are currently not active for this project configuration. Set <GenerateDocumentationFile>true</GenerateDocumentationFile> in the project file to enable them.

data.name: RH8402Title
data.value: Files must start with configured copyright header

data.name: RH8402MessageFormat
data.value: The file must start with the configured copyright header.

data.name: RH8031Title
data.value: Extension declarations must have summary text

data.name: RH8031MessageFormat
data.value: Extension declarations must include a non-empty <summary> tag.

data.name: RH8032Title
data.value: Extension declaration parameters must be documented

data.name: RH8032MessageFormat
data.value: Extension declaration parameters must have matching <param> documentation.

data.name: RH8033Title
data.value: Extension declaration type parameters must be documented

data.name: RH8033MessageFormat
data.value: Extension declaration type parameters must have matching <typeparam> documentation.

data.name: RH7207Title
data.value: Using directives should be organized into groups

data.name: RH7207MessageFormat
data.value: Using directives should be organized into groups separated by blank lines.

data.name: RH5111Title
data.value: Assignments must have proper line breaks

data.name: RH5111MessageFormat
data.value: Assignment target and equals operator must be on the same line, and the equals operator and the start of the value must be on the same line.

data.name: RH5205Title
data.value: Statement lambda opening braces should be aligned

data.name: RH5205MessageFormat
data.value: Statement lambda opening brace should align with the lambda argument anchor.

data.name: RH5029Title
data.value: Local declarations should be preceded by a blank line.

data.name: RH5029MessageFormat
data.value: Local declarations should be preceded by a blank line.

data.name: RH5030Title
data.value: Blank line after closing brace

data.name: RH5030MessageFormat
data.value: Add a blank line after the closing brace.

data.name: RH7501Title
data.value: Break statements should not be inside explicit switch case blocks.

data.name: RH7501MessageFormat
data.value: Move the break statement after the explicit switch case block.

data.name: RH7004Title
data.value: Using declarations should not be used

data.name: RH7004MessageFormat
data.value: Replace the using declaration with a using statement block.

data.name: RH7307Title
data.value: Region descriptions should not be Member or Members

data.name: RH7307MessageFormat
data.value: Use a more descriptive region description than 'Member' or 'Members'.

data.name: RH7308Title
data.value: Standard regions should contain only their matching member kind

data.name: RH7308MessageFormat
data.value: The standard region '{0}' should contain only {1}.

data.name: RH8201MessageFormat
data.value: The \<inheritdoc/> Tag should be used if possible.

data.name: RH8201Title
data.value: The \<inheritdoc/> Tag should be used if possible.

data.name: RH8001MessageFormat
data.value: Non-private class must be documented.

data.name: RH8001Title
data.value: Non-private classes must be documented

data.name: RH8002MessageFormat
data.value: Private class must be documented.

data.name: RH8002Title
data.value: Private classes must be documented

data.name: RH8003MessageFormat
data.value: Non-private struct must be documented.

data.name: RH8003Title
data.value: Non-private structs must be documented

data.name: RH8004MessageFormat
data.value: Private struct must be documented.

data.name: RH8004Title
data.value: Private structs must be documented

data.name: RH8005MessageFormat
data.value: Non-private interface must be documented.

data.name: RH8005Title
data.value: Non-private interfaces must be documented

data.name: RH8006MessageFormat
data.value: Private interface must be documented.

data.name: RH8006Title
data.value: Private interfaces must be documented

data.name: RH8007MessageFormat
data.value: Non-private record must be documented.

data.name: RH8007Title
data.value: Non-private records must be documented

data.name: RH8008MessageFormat
data.value: Private record must be documented.

data.name: RH8008Title
data.value: Private records must be documented

data.name: RH8009MessageFormat
data.value: Non-private record struct must be documented.

data.name: RH8009Title
data.value: Non-private record structs must be documented

data.name: RH8010MessageFormat
data.value: Private record struct must be documented.

data.name: RH8010Title
data.value: Private record structs must be documented

data.name: RH8011MessageFormat
data.value: Non-private enum must be documented.

data.name: RH8011Title
data.value: Non-private enums must be documented

data.name: RH8012MessageFormat
data.value: Private enum must be documented.

data.name: RH8012Title
data.value: Private enums must be documented

data.name: RH8013MessageFormat
data.value: Enum member in non-private enum must be documented.

data.name: RH8013Title
data.value: Enum members in non-private enums must be documented

data.name: RH8014MessageFormat
data.value: Enum member in private enum must be documented.

data.name: RH8014Title
data.value: Enum members in private enums must be documented

data.name: RH8015MessageFormat
data.value: Non-private delegate must be documented.

data.name: RH8015Title
data.value: Non-private delegates must be documented

data.name: RH8016MessageFormat
data.value: Private delegate must be documented.

data.name: RH8016Title
data.value: Private delegates must be documented

data.name: RH8017MessageFormat
data.value: Non-private constructor must be documented.

data.name: RH8017Title
data.value: Non-private constructors must be documented

data.name: RH8018MessageFormat
data.value: Private constructor must be documented.

data.name: RH8018Title
data.value: Private constructors must be documented

data.name: RH8019MessageFormat
data.value: Destructor must be documented.

data.name: RH8019Title
data.value: Destructors must be documented

data.name: RH8020MessageFormat
data.value: Non-private method must be documented.

data.name: RH8020Title
data.value: Non-private methods must be documented

data.name: RH8021MessageFormat
data.value: Private method must be documented.

data.name: RH8021Title
data.value: Private methods must be documented

data.name: RH8022MessageFormat
data.value: Non-private property must be documented.

data.name: RH8022Title
data.value: Non-private properties must be documented

data.name: RH8023MessageFormat
data.value: Private property must be documented.

data.name: RH8023Title
data.value: Private properties must be documented

data.name: RH8024MessageFormat
data.value: Non-private indexer must be documented.

data.name: RH8024Title
data.value: Non-private indexers must be documented

data.name: RH8025MessageFormat
data.value: Private indexer must be documented.

data.name: RH8025Title
data.value: Private indexers must be documented

data.name: RH8026MessageFormat
data.value: Non-private field must be documented.

data.name: RH8026Title
data.value: Non-private fields must be documented

data.name: RH8027MessageFormat
data.value: Private field must be documented.

data.name: RH8027Title
data.value: Private fields must be documented

data.name: RH8028MessageFormat
data.value: Non-private event must be documented.

data.name: RH8028Title
data.value: Non-private events must be documented

data.name: RH8029MessageFormat
data.value: Private event must be documented.

data.name: RH8029Title
data.value: Private events must be documented

data.name: RH8030MessageFormat
data.value: The <summary> tag must contain text.

data.name: RH8030Title
data.value: Element documentation must have summary text

data.name: RH8202MessageFormat
data.value: Do not use the <value> tag.

data.name: RH8202Title
data.value: <value> tag must not be used

data.name: RH8101MessageFormat
data.value: Each parameter must have a corresponding <param> tag.

data.name: RH8101Title
data.value: Element parameters must be documented

data.name: RH8102MessageFormat
data.value: Parameter documentation must match the declared parameters and their order.

data.name: RH8102Title
data.value: Element parameter documentation must match element parameters

data.name: RH8103MessageFormat
data.value: Each <param> tag must declare a parameter name.

data.name: RH8103Title
data.value: Element parameter documentation must declare parameter name

data.name: RH8104MessageFormat
data.value: Each <param> tag must contain text.

data.name: RH8104Title
data.value: Element parameter documentation must have text

data.name: RH8105MessageFormat
data.value: The return value must be documented with a <returns> tag.

data.name: RH8105Title
data.value: Element return value must be documented

data.name: RH8106MessageFormat
data.value: The <returns> tag must contain text.

data.name: RH8106Title
data.value: Element return value documentation must have text

data.name: RH8107MessageFormat
data.value: Void members must not contain a <returns> tag.

data.name: RH8107Title
data.value: Void return value must not be documented

data.name: RH8108MessageFormat
data.value: Each generic type parameter must have a corresponding <typeparam> tag.

data.name: RH8108Title
data.value: Generic type parameters must be documented

data.name: RH8109MessageFormat
data.value: Type parameter documentation must match the declared type parameters and their order.

data.name: RH8109Title
data.value: Generic type parameter documentation must match type parameters

data.name: RH8110MessageFormat
data.value: Each <typeparam> tag must declare a type parameter name.

data.name: RH8110Title
data.value: Generic type parameter documentation must declare parameter name

data.name: RH8111MessageFormat
data.value: Each <typeparam> tag must contain text.

data.name: RH8111Title
data.value: Generic type parameter documentation must have text

data.name: RH8401MessageFormat
data.value: Single-line comments must not start with documentation comment slashes.

data.name: RH8401Title
data.value: Single-line comments must not use documentation style slashes

data.name: RH8203MessageFormat
data.value: <inheritdoc> may only be used on inheriting or implementing declarations.

data.name: RH8203Title
data.value: <inheritdoc> must be used with inheriting class

data.name: RH8204MessageFormat
data.value: Documentation must not contain <placeholder> elements.

data.name: RH8204Title
data.value: Do not use placeholder elements

data.name: RH1001MessageFormat
data.value: Types used as keys must implement equality members.

data.name: RH1001Title
data.value: Types used as keys must implement equality members.

data.name: RH1002MessageFormat
data.value: Types used for equality comparison must implement equality members

data.name: RH1002Title
data.value: Types used for equality comparison must implement equality members

data.name: RH1003MessageFormat
data.value: Use string interpolation instead of string concatenation.

data.name: RH1003Title
data.value: Use string interpolation instead of string concatenation.

data.name: RH5501MessageFormat
data.value: Assembly attributes must be on their own line.

data.name: RH5501Title
data.value: Assembly attributes must be on their own line

data.name: RH5502MessageFormat
data.value: Assembly attribute lists must use one attribute per list.

data.name: RH5502Title
data.value: Assembly attribute lists must use one attribute per list

data.name: RH5503MessageFormat
data.value: Module attributes must be on their own line.

data.name: RH5503Title
data.value: Module attributes must be on their own line

data.name: RH5504MessageFormat
data.value: Module attribute lists must use one attribute per list.

data.name: RH5504Title
data.value: Module attribute lists must use one attribute per list

data.name: RH5505MessageFormat
data.value: Class attributes must be on their own line.

data.name: RH5505Title
data.value: Class attributes must be on their own line

data.name: RH5506MessageFormat
data.value: Class attribute lists must use one attribute per list.

data.name: RH5506Title
data.value: Class attribute lists must use one attribute per list

data.name: RH5507MessageFormat
data.value: Struct attributes must be on their own line.

data.name: RH5507Title
data.value: Struct attributes must be on their own line

data.name: RH5508MessageFormat
data.value: Struct attribute lists must use one attribute per list.

data.name: RH5508Title
data.value: Struct attribute lists must use one attribute per list

data.name: RH5509MessageFormat
data.value: Enum attributes must be on their own line.

data.name: RH5509Title
data.value: Enum attributes must be on their own line

data.name: RH5510MessageFormat
data.value: Enum attribute lists must use one attribute per list.

data.name: RH5510Title
data.value: Enum attribute lists must use one attribute per list

data.name: RH5511MessageFormat
data.value: Constructor attributes must be on their own line.

data.name: RH5511Title
data.value: Constructor attributes must be on their own line

data.name: RH5512MessageFormat
data.value: Constructor attribute lists must use one attribute per list.

data.name: RH5512Title
data.value: Constructor attribute lists must use one attribute per list

data.name: RH5513MessageFormat
data.value: Method attributes must be on their own line.

data.name: RH5513Title
data.value: Method attributes must be on their own line

data.name: RH5514MessageFormat
data.value: Method attribute lists must use one attribute per list.

data.name: RH5514Title
data.value: Method attribute lists must use one attribute per list

data.name: RH5515MessageFormat
data.value: Property attributes must be on their own line.

data.name: RH5515Title
data.value: Property attributes must be on their own line

data.name: RH5516MessageFormat
data.value: Property attribute lists must use one attribute per list.

data.name: RH5516Title
data.value: Property attribute lists must use one attribute per list

data.name: RH5517MessageFormat
data.value: Field attributes must be on their own line.

data.name: RH5517Title
data.value: Field attributes must be on their own line

data.name: RH5518MessageFormat
data.value: Field attribute lists must use one attribute per list.

data.name: RH5518Title
data.value: Field attribute lists must use one attribute per list

data.name: RH5519MessageFormat
data.value: Event attributes must be on their own line.

data.name: RH5519Title
data.value: Event attributes must be on their own line

data.name: RH5520MessageFormat
data.value: Event attribute lists must use one attribute per list.

data.name: RH5520Title
data.value: Event attribute lists must use one attribute per list

data.name: RH5521MessageFormat
data.value: Interface attributes must be on their own line.

data.name: RH5521Title
data.value: Interface attributes must be on their own line

data.name: RH5522MessageFormat
data.value: Interface attribute lists must use one attribute per list.

data.name: RH5522Title
data.value: Interface attribute lists must use one attribute per list

data.name: RH5523MessageFormat
data.value: Parameter attributes must stay inline.

data.name: RH5523Title
data.value: Parameter attributes must stay inline

data.name: RH5524MessageFormat
data.value: Parameter attributes must use merged attribute lists.

data.name: RH5524Title
data.value: Parameter attributes must use merged attribute lists

data.name: RH5525MessageFormat
data.value: Delegate attributes must be on their own line.

data.name: RH5525Title
data.value: Delegate attributes must be on their own line

data.name: RH5526MessageFormat
data.value: Delegate attribute lists must use one attribute per list.

data.name: RH5526Title
data.value: Delegate attribute lists must use one attribute per list

data.name: RH5527MessageFormat
data.value: Return value attributes must be on their own line.

data.name: RH5527Title
data.value: Return value attributes must be on their own line

data.name: RH5528MessageFormat
data.value: Return value attribute lists must use one attribute per list.

data.name: RH5528Title
data.value: Return value attribute lists must use one attribute per list

data.name: RH5529MessageFormat
data.value: Generic parameter attributes must use merged attribute lists.

data.name: RH5529Title
data.value: Generic parameter attributes must use merged attribute lists

data.name: RH5530MessageFormat
data.value: Accessor attributes must follow placement rules.

data.name: RH5530Title
data.value: Accessor attributes must follow placement rules

data.name: RH5531MessageFormat
data.value: Accessor attribute lists must follow shape rules.

data.name: RH5531Title
data.value: Accessor attribute lists must follow shape rules

data.name: RH5113Title
data.value: Declaration semicolon must stay on the declaration line

data.name: RH5113MessageFormat
data.value: The terminating semicolon of a member declaration must appear on the same line as the end of the declaration.
